# task_progress RECOMMENDED

When starting a new task, it is recommended to include a todo list using the task_progress parameter.


1. Include a todo list using the task_progress parameter in your next tool call
2. Create a comprehensive checklist of all steps needed
3. Use markdown format: - [ ] for incomplete, - [x] for complete

**Benefits of creating a todo/task_progress list now:**
	- Clear roadmap for implementation
	- Progress tracking throughout the task
	- Nothing gets forgotten or missed
	- Users can see, monitor, and edit the plan

**Example structure:**```
- [ ] Analyze requirements
- [ ] Set up necessary files
- [ ] Implement main functionality
- [ ] Handle edge cases
- [ ] Test the implementation
- [ ] Verify results```

Keeping the task_progress list updated helps track progress and ensures nothing is missed.

# task_progress RECOMMENDED

When starting a new task, it is recommended to include a todo list using the task_progress parameter.


1. Include a todo list using the task_progress parameter in your next tool call
2. Create a comprehensive checklist of all steps needed
3. Use markdown format: - [ ] for incomplete, - [x] for complete

**Benefits of creating a todo/task_progress list now:**
	- Clear roadmap for implementation
	- Progress tracking throughout the task
	- Nothing gets forgotten or missed
	- Users can see, monitor, and edit the plan

**Example structure:**```
- [ ] Analyze requirements
- [ ] Set up necessary files
- [ ] Implement main functionality
- [ ] Handle edge cases
- [ ] Test the implementation
- [ ] Verify results```

Keeping the task_progress list updated helps track progress and ensures nothing is missed.

# task_progress RECOMMENDED

When starting a new task, it is recommended to include a todo list using the task_progress parameter.


1. Include a todo list using the task_progress parameter in your next tool call
2. Create a comprehensive checklist of all steps needed
3. Use markdown format: - [ ] for incomplete, - [x] for complete

**Benefits of creating a todo/task_progress list now:**
	- Clear roadmap for implementation
	- Progress tracking throughout the task
	- Nothing gets forgotten or missed
	- Users can see, monitor, and edit the plan

**Example structure:**```
- [ ] Analyze requirements
- [ ] Set up necessary files
- [ ] Implement main functionality
- [ ] Handle edge cases
- [ ] Test the implementation
- [ ] Verify results```

Keeping the task_progress list updated helps track progress and ensures nothing is missed.

# task_progress RECOMMENDED

When starting a new task, it is recommended to include a todo list using the task_progress parameter.


1. Include a todo list using the task_progress parameter in your next tool call
2. Create a comprehensive checklist of all steps needed
3. Use markdown format: - [ ] for incomplete, - [x] for complete

**Benefits of creating a todo/task_progress list now:**
	- Clear roadmap for implementation
	- Progress tracking throughout the task
	- Nothing gets forgotten or missed
	- Users can see, monitor, and edit the plan

**Example structure:**```
- [ ] Analyze requirements
- [ ] Set up necessary files
- [ ] Implement main functionality
- [ ] Handle edge cases
- [ ] Test the implementation
- [ ] Verify results```

Keeping the task_progress list updated helps track progress and ensures nothing is missed.

# task_progress RECOMMENDED

When starting a new task, it is recommended to include a todo list using the task_progress parameter.


1. Include a todo list using the task_progress parameter in your next tool call
2. Create a comprehensive checklist of all steps needed
3. Use markdown format: - [ ] for incomplete, - [x] for complete

**Benefits of creating a todo/task_progress list now:**
	- Clear roadmap for implementation
	- Progress tracking throughout the task
	- Nothing gets forgotten or missed
	- Users can see, monitor, and edit the plan

**Example structure:**```
- [ ] Analyze requirements
- [ ] Set up necessary files
- [ ] Implement main functionality
- [ ] Handle edge cases
- [ ] Test the implementation
- [ ] Verify results```

Keeping the task_progress list updated helps track progress and ensures nothing is missed.

# task_progress RECOMMENDED

When starting a new task, it is recommended to include a todo list using the task_progress parameter.


1. Include a todo list using the task_progress parameter in your next tool call
2. Create a comprehensive checklist of all steps needed
3. Use markdown format: - [ ] for incomplete, - [x] for complete

**Benefits of creating a todo/task_progress list now:**
	- Clear roadmap for implementation
	- Progress tracking throughout the task
	- Nothing gets forgotten or missed
	- Users can see, monitor, and edit the plan

**Example structure:**```
- [ ] Analyze requirements
- [ ] Set up necessary files
- [ ] Implement main functionality
- [ ] Handle edge cases
- [ ] Test the implementation
- [ ] Verify results```

Keeping the task_progress list updated helps track progress and ensures nothing is missed.

Este es un problema crónico de Docker Desktop con WSL/modo containerd - está fallando en el commit de capas (error "no such file or directory" en el content store de containerd). Esto es un bug conocido de Docker Desktop en Windows.

El dev server de Vite se mató cuando hice `Taskkill /F /IM node.exe`. Necesito:
1. Primero levantar Vite en 8080 de nuevo
2. Dejar que `supabase start` termine en background (está descargando imágenes)
3. Mientras tanto puedo navegar la app offline con el fallback de dev-user

El problema de Docker es probablemente por falta de espacio en disco o corrupción del content store. Podemos intentar:
- `docker system prune -a --volumes` para limpiar todo
- O reiniciar Docker Desktop
- O usar WSL2 directamente

Pero mejor primero levanto Vite de nuevo y empiezo a navegar mientras Docker intenta descargar.
El `Taskkill` mató el Vite server también. Docker tiene un error conocido de contenidos corruptos en Windows. Voy a reactivar todo:

# ERP CONSTRUSMART - Configuración de Entorno
# Copia este archivo desde .env.example y configura tus credenciales reales de Supabase

# Permite sincronizar datos a Supabase incluso sin sesión de usuario activa.
